name: Email Validation API
tagline: Validate email addresses instantly without sending emails
description: Production-ready email validation API that checks format (RFC 5322), MX records, disposable domains (500+), free providers, role-based addresses, and suggests typo corrections. All checks performed without sending any emails. Powered by Cloudflare Workers for ultra-low latency worldwide.

features: Up to 50 emails per bulk request
Up to 50 emails per bulk request

long_description:
Production-ready email validation API that checks format (RFC 5322), MX records, disposable domains (500+), free providers, role-based addresses, and suggests typo corrections. All checks performed without sending any emails. Powered by Cloudflare Workers for ultra-low latency worldwide.

💎 FREE tier available! Upgrade to Pro for 50,000 requests/month, higher rate limits, and priority support. Ultra and Mega plans available for enterprise-scale usage.
